The '''Golden Yoke''' was a customized [[Tarrvin-on-Kallik]] [[Blade-28 fighter]] belonging to [[Pekaelic ke Teldan]], the [[Perator]] of [[Cartann]].

==History==
The [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] drew its name from its unique solid gold color scheme, and had been flown by [[Pekaelic ke Teldan|Pekaelic]] during the great military victories of his youth. The fighter was nearly as famous on [[Cartann]] as Pekaelic himself, and one of the Perator's titles was "[[Master of the Golden Yoke]]."

After becoming Perator, Pekaelic stored the Golden Yoke in his personal hangar, a short distance from his palace in [[Cartann City]]. A secret access tunnel allowed him to quickly and easily reach the hangar whenever he desired to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] his fighter.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
